name: fdm_klipper_common
machine_start_gcode:
G90 ; use absolute coordinates
M83 ; use relative distances for extrusion
M140 S{first_layer_bed_temperature[0]} ; set bed temp
M104 S140 ; set temporary nozzle temp to prevent oozing
G4 S10 ; wait 10s for preheating
G28 ; home all axes
G1 Z50 F240 ; raise Z axis
G1 X2 Y10 F3000 ; move to start position
M104 S{first_layer_temperature[0]} ; set final nozzle temp
M190 S{first_layer_bed_temperature[0]} ; wait for bed temp
M109 S{first_layer_temperature[0]} ; wait for nozzle temp
G1 Z0.28 F240 ; lower nozzle to print height
G92 E0 ; reset extrusion distance
G1 Y140 E10 F1500 ; prime the nozzle
G1 X2.3 F5000 ; slight X adjustment
G92 E0 ; reset extrusion distance
G1 Y10 E10 F1200 ; prime again
G92 E0 ; final extrusion reset
